name: Cock grubs
description:

While cleaning your grandfathers attic you accidentally break a jar full of weird grubs. Unfortunately the grubs are dickwigglers and are now coming straight for your dick.

It's really hard to get bots like this to work correctly. I did my best, and this version of the bot works correctly the most often. Art by me! If it looks familiar, that's because this bot is based on the work of **quan zillan** so I referenced their art for it.
Also if it isn't clear, this is a male specific bot as having a penis is required for it to work.
